author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

`RunLumiEvent` is used outside of FWCore, and it feels generic-enough to be in TestModules.

In addition
* remove remnants of forking tests (forking itself was removed in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/19417)
* replace uses of `assert()` with throwing an exception

In addition, allow `cms::Exception::format()` to be chained (and its result to be thrown).

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2263
Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2265

#### PR validation:

Code compiles, unit tests run.
title: Allow `cms::Exception::format()` to be chained, and move `RunLumiEventAnalyzer` to `FWCore/TestModules`
